input.function: () => { const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a')); return links.filter(a => a.textContent && (a.textContent.toUpperCase().includes('TRADE') || a.textContent.toUpperCase().includes('PORTFOLIO') || a.textContent.toUpperCase().includes('BUY') || a.textContent.toUpperCase().includes('ORDER'))).slice(0, 10).map(a => ({text: a.textContent.trim().substring(0, 50), href: a.href})); }

() => { const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, a.button')); return buttons.filter(b => b.textContent && b.textContent.length < 50).slice(0, 20).map(b => ({tag: b.tagName, text: b.textContent.trim(), class: b.className})); }
